---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement
title: "[feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What user/operator problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Boundaries

What is explicitly out of scope?

## Acceptance signals

How should we verify this works?

## Risks / tradeoffs

Any truth-model, authority, or compatibility risk?

## Additional context

Links, examples, or prior discussion.
